$comment: Generated from the hub catalog by tools/gen-app-defs.mjs edit the catalog, not here.
name: Holo Notepad
summary: Your second brain a networked, private outliner and always-on memory bank.

description.p: Notes are only as useful as the connections between them and they should stay private.
A serverless, end-to-end-encrypted, content-addressed graph links every thought; bidirectional links and block references re-derive identically on every peer (Law L5).

ul: An always-on memory bank for humans and agents

releases.description: Your second brain: an always-on, ubiquitous MEMORY BANK (gbrain-style). A brain icon + Ctrl/Cmd-Shift-K on every holospace; auto-captures the apps/pages/articles you open and your interactions with humans and AI agents onto a daily timeline, auto-linking entities into one content-addressed knowledge/social/internet graph. 100% local with a master kill-switch; O(1) content-addressed recall; selective sharing gated by Holo Privacy + Holo Terms; zero-knowledge Merkle-membership + SD selective-disclosure proofs (real WebCrypto, no SNARK). Witnessed (node 27/27 + live 2-tab browser 12/12).

Roam Research, natively encoded: a serverless, E2E, content-addressed networked outliner with infinitely nestable blocks, [[wiki-links]] / #tags / ((block refs)), daily notes, live Linked + Unlinked References, queries, a right sidebar, a graph overview and a command palette. The bidirectional link graph is a pure derivation of content (Law L5). Real-time multiplayer; pages content-addressed by title; a saved graph IS holo://κ. Witnessed (node 40/40 + live 2-peer browser 11/11).
